message:
fix(db): use owned String keys in S3-FIFO ghost survival test

The test_ghost_survives_remove_reinsert test was using &str literals as
cache keys, which no longer matches the cache's key type after the
S3-FIFO sequence tracking changes. Convert all key arguments from &str
literals to String::from(...) so the test compiles against the current
Cache<String, i32> signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
